'''âg-f-j''' ('''gafaja''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:prebless|prebless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-f-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:prebless|prebless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-f-j
|-
! Lemma
| gafaja
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gafajithi|gafajithi]] || [[word:gafajiji|gafajiji]] || [[word:gafajishi|gafajishi]] || [[word:gafaji|gafaji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gafajuthuth|gafajuthuth]] || [[word:gafajujuj|gafajujuj]] || [[word:gafajushush|gafajushush]] || [[word:gafaj|gafaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gafajuthu|gafajuthu]] || [[word:gafajuju|gafajuju]] || [[word:gafajushu|gafajushu]] || [[word:gafaju|gafaju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gafajufuth|gafajufuth]] || [[word:gafajufuj|gafajufuj]] || [[word:gafajufush|gafajufush]] || [[word:gafajuf|gafajuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gafajethe|gafajethe]] || [[word:gafajeje|gafajeje]] || [[word:gafajeshe|gafajeshe]] || [[word:gafaje|gafaje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gafajothoth|gafajothoth]] || [[word:gafajojoj|gafajojoj]] || [[word:gafajoshosh|gafajoshosh]] || [[word:gafaj|gafaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gafajotho|gafajotho]] || [[word:gafajojo|gafajojo]] || [[word:gafajosho|gafajosho]] || [[word:gafajo|gafajo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gafajofoth|gafajofoth]] || [[word:gafajofoj|gafajofoj]] || [[word:gafajofosh|gafajofosh]] || [[word:gafajof|gafajof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gafajĂŠthĂŠ|gafajĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:gafajĂŠjĂŠ|gafajĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:gafajĂŠshĂŠ|gafajĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:gafajĂŠ|gafajĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gafajathath|gafajathath]] || [[word:gafajajaj|gafajajaj]] || [[word:gafajashash|gafajashash]] || [[word:gafaj|gafaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gafajatha|gafajatha]] || [[word:gafajaja|gafajaja]] || [[word:gafajasha|gafajasha]] || [[word:gafaja|gafaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gafajafath|gafajafath]] || [[word:gafajafaj|gafajafaj]] || [[word:gafajafash|gafajafash]] || [[word:gafajaf|gafajaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:gafajasha|gafajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gogafajasha|gogafajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokigafajasha|gokigafajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:gafajnĂŒsha|gafajnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gogafajnknĂŒsha|gogafajnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokigafajnĂŒsha|gokigafajnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gafajshĂ«sha|gafajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogafajnkshĂ«sha|gogafajnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigafajshĂ«sha|gokigafajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gafajrosha|gafajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogafajnkrosha|gogafajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigafajrosha|gokigafajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gafajmusha|gafajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gogafajnkmusha|gogafajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafajmusha|gokigafajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gafajsherasha|gafajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gogafajnksherasha|gogafajnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokigafajsherasha|gokigafajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:gafajngasha|gafajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gogafajnkngasha|gogafajnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokigafajngasha|gokigafajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gafajyasha|gafajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gogafajnkyasha|gogafajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokigafajyasha|gokigafajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gafajyamasha|gafajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gogafajnkyamasha|gogafajnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokigafajyamasha|gokigafajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gafajnĂŒshĂ«sha|gafajnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogafajnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gogafajnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigafajnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokigafajnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gafajnĂŒrosha|gafajnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogafajnknĂŒrosha|gogafajnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigafajnĂŒrosha|gokigafajnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafajnĂŒmusha|gafajnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogafajnknĂŒmusha|gogafajnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafajnĂŒmusha|gokigafajnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gafajshĂ«nĂŒsha|gafajshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogafajnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gogafajnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigafajshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokigafajshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gafajshĂ«rosha|gafajshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogafajnkshĂ«rosha|gogafajnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigafajshĂ«rosha|gokigafajshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafajshĂ«musha|gafajshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogafajnkshĂ«musha|gogafajnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafajshĂ«musha|gokigafajshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gafajronĂŒsha|gafajronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogafajnkronĂŒsha|gogafajnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigafajronĂŒsha|gokigafajronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gafajroshĂ«sha|gafajroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogafajnkroshĂ«sha|gogafajnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigafajroshĂ«sha|gokigafajroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafajromusha|gafajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogafajnkromusha|gogafajnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafajromusha|gokigafajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gafajmunĂŒsha|gafajmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogafajnkmunĂŒsha|gogafajnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigafajmunĂŒsha|gokigafajmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gafajmushĂ«sha|gafajmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogafajnkmushĂ«sha|gogafajnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigafajmushĂ«sha|gokigafajmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gafajmurosha|gafajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogafajnkmurosha|gogafajnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigafajmurosha|gokigafajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:gafaj|gafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:gĂŠfĂŠj|gĂŠfĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hogafaj|hogafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hogĂŠfĂŠj|hogĂŠfĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohogafaj|hohogafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohogĂŠfĂŠj|hohogĂŠfĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒgafaj|nĂŒgafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒgĂŠfĂŠj|nĂŒgĂŠfĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒgafaj|nĂŒnĂŒgafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒgĂŠfĂŠj|nĂŒnĂŒgĂŠfĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻgafaj|nĂŻgafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻgĂŠfĂŠj|nĂŻgĂŠfĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻgafaj|nĂŻnĂŻgafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻgĂŠfĂŠj|nĂŻnĂŻgĂŠfĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lugafaj|lugafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lugĂŠfĂŠj|lugĂŠfĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulugafaj|lulugafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulugĂŠfĂŠj|lulugĂŠfĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:ligafaj|ligafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ligĂŠfĂŠj|ligĂŠfĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liligafaj|liligafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liligĂŠfĂŠj|liligĂŠfĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kogafaj|kogafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kogĂŠfĂŠj|kogĂŠfĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokogafaj|kokogafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokogĂŠfĂŠj|kokogĂŠfĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kegafaj|kegafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kegĂŠfĂŠj|kegĂŠfĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekegafaj|kekegafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekegĂŠfĂŠj|kekegĂŠfĂŠj]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
